creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
See "Synopsis"

Fix: Apply the following patch.



---HCflote5pv2zWbnTsYcVjrGvaGI5EXkR3rQ1ffdDnQuqlNkR

+++ Makefile	2 Nov 2009 09:09:37 -0000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@

 PORTNAME=	Devel-Cycle
-PORTVERSION=	1.10
+PORTVERSION=	1.11

 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
